properties.address: 820 WEST PACES FERRY RD NW, ATLANTA GA 30327

properties.tree_description:
Sweetgum has a moderate-sized decay pocket approximately 5 feet above grade, along with deadwood present throughout the canopy. Previous limb failures have also occurred from the tree. The tree directly overhangs a frequently used parking area where vehicles are regularly parked and is consistently dropping limbs and other debris, impacting the vehicles below. Due to the observed decay, history of limb failure, canopy condition, and proximity to a high-use target area, removal is recommended at this time to protect the surrounding residence, vehicles, and structures from potential future limb or tree failure.Reason for Removal:Dying tree
